SELECT
    CASE
      WHEN ISNULL($[$38.U_SLD_Dis_Amount.NUMBER], 0) = 0
        THEN CAST(($[$38.11.NUMBER] - ISNULL($[$38.U_SLD_Free.NUMBER],0)) * $[$38.U_SLD_Unitprice.NUMBER] AS DECIMAL(19,6))
      ELSE
        CAST(
          ($[$38.11.NUMBER] - ISNULL($[$38.U_SLD_Free.NUMBER],0)) * $[$38.U_SLD_Unitprice.NUMBER]
          - $[$38.U_SLD_Dis_Amount.NUMBER]
          AS DECIMAL(19,6))
    END

SELECT
    CASE
      WHEN ISNULL($[$38.15.NUMBER], 0) = 0
        THEN 0
      WHEN ISNULL($[$38.U_SLD_Unitprice.NUMBER], 0) = 0
        OR ISNULL($[$38.11.NUMBER], 0) = 0
        THEN 0
      ELSE
        CAST(
          ($[$38.11.NUMBER] - ISNULL($[$38.U_SLD_Free.NUMBER],0)) * $[$38.U_SLD_Unitprice.NUMBER]
          * $[$38.15.NUMBER] / 100
          AS DECIMAL(19,6))
    END
